title: 10 Pack Large Aluminium Foil Trays Deep (32x26x7 cm) - Tin Foil Trays Containers for Cooking, Baking, Broiling, Roasting, BBQ, and Party (3500ml)
features: Perfect Package: Our large tin foil trays come in a pack of 10. Each foil roasting tray measures 32 x 26 cm with a depth of 7 cm, making these deep foil trays perfect for cooking and freezing bulky meals.

Premium Quality: Made of recyclable aluminium material, our foil food containers are exceptionally thick and sturdy, providing a secure grip for easy handling and serving. Our catering trays are dishwasher, oven, and freezer safe, providing versatility and durability for any cooking task.

Reusable & Recyclable: Without worrying about cleaning, put the foil takeaway containers in the dishwasher and reuse them later. Additionally, our disposable foil takeaway containers are durable for long-term use, but you can easily dispose of them if no longer needed, making them a convenient choice.

Multipurpose: These foil baking trays are perfect for a wide range of applications, including baking cakes, cooking, broiling, and roasting. Whether you need foil trays for baking, foil trays for turkey, or foil trays for BBQ, these sturdy containers are up to the task. These BBQ trays are especially suitable for cooking bulk meals and packing leftovers for your guests.

Perfect for Baking & Freezing: Our foil platter trays can withstand high temperature, making them highly heat conductive without imparting a metallic taste to your food. These foil pans are also designed to endure freezing temperatures, making them ideal for storing food in the refrigerator.
